name: Sysmon File Executable Creation Detected
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Sysmon File Executable Creation Detected
SIGMA Description: Triggers on any Sysmon "FileExecutableDetected" event, which triggers every time a PE that is monitored by the config is created.

False positives:
- Unlikely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=29 AQL filter query
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Bahrain Duty Free, Health360, NOMAC
TD_list: APPLY Sysmon File Executable Creation Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=29 AQL filter query
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Bahrain Duty Free, Health360, NOMAC
RED_list: Event name: Sysmon File Executable Creation Detected
